ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the customer */,
  "employment_status" INTEGER /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer became a policyholder */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_employment_status FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the policy */,
  "policy_type" INTEGER /* Type of policy (e.g., auto, home, health) */,
  "coverage" INTEGER /* Level of coverage (e.g., basic, extended, premium) */,
  "premium" REAL /* Monthly premium amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy became effective */,
  "renew_offer_type" TEXT /* Type of renewal offer (e.g., offer1, offer2, offer3) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who sold the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  "policy_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or special conditions */,
  "premium_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next premium payment is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policy_type FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_coverage FOREIGN KEY ("coverage") REFERENCES coverages ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "adjusted_amount" REAL /* Final amount after adjustments */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjuster who handled the claim */,
  "claim_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or special conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, SUV) */,
  "vehicle_size" TEXT /* Size of the vehicle (e.g., compact, midsize, full-size) */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., four-door car, two-door car) */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Vehicle registration number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education (e.g., high school, college, bachelor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Status of employment (e.g., employed, unemployed, medical leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Status of marital status (e.g., married, single, divorced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., auto, home, health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverages" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage level */,
  "coverage_level" TEXT /* Level of coverage (e.g., basic, extended, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, underwriter, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view policy) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
